regulations.title: Italian Plastic Tax
regulations.summary: Portal registered 5 February 2026; Huhtamaki Mater-Bi trial on track for April; EN 13432 cert required by July.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Glass bottles classified Class A; 5% reuse rate required 2028; CONAI consortium reuse feasibility study Q2 2026.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: Draft sustainability statement targeting board approval 30 April 2026; SBTi target letter due 30 June.

regulations.title: EU Taxonomy Regulation — Article 8 Disclosures
regulations.summary: Taxonomy alignment assessment in progress; kiln transition plan under development for E1 TSC compliance.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
regulations.summary: MIMIT civil liability provisions for agri first-tier suppliers confirmed; Toffoletto De Luca engaged for contract revision.
